review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify that no placeholder text (Content in progress / 内容完善中) remains in documentation/EN or documentation/ZH.
Verify that the execution-contract, execution-result, and review-decision schemas from schemas/ are explicitly embedded in the schema-reference.md files.
Verify that 3 concrete YAML examples (feature-development, assist, custom-deploy-pipeline) exist in the yaml-dag-engine.md documentation.
Verify that explicit Git/CLI commands for Team Collaboration and Dual-Tiered Sync (git fetch agent-sync, agent-protocol-review) are documented.
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/ or bin/) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred outside of this docs upgrade patch progression.
